description.ko: 생물학적 생명과 디지털 코드가 공존하는 사이버네틱 생태계에 대한 정교한 시각화로, 발광하는 식물 구조를 통해 데이터를 처리하는 FLORA-9의 능력을 보여줍니다.
description.en: An intricate visualization of a cybernetic ecosystem where biological life and digital code coexist, showcasing FLORA-9's ability to process data through its luminous botanical structure.

prompt: A futuristic botanical sanctuary featuring FLORA-9, translucent bioluminescent orchid-like flowers with glowing micro-circuitry etched onto their petals, integrated with pulsing fiber-optic vines and holographic data streams, deep forest green and electric violet color palette, macro photography style, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic digital nature.
